work.name: Baidu Inc.
highlights: Background: Conducted algorithm research on multimodal image understanding and image editing generation, covering visual perception, editing parameter prediction, and generative model optimization.
Multimodal Image Understanding Model:
Built a structured dataset for image-editing operators and editing instructions, including single-image data and paired before-after editing data for two-stage training.
Fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-4B with LoRA for intelligent photo-editing parameter prediction.
Designed a two-stage training strategy to extend the model from single-image understanding to before-and-after editing difference modeling, achieving an F1-score of 92% on the test set.
Creative Image Generation and Editing:
Developed an AI portrait outfit replacement pipeline based on image editing models.
Extracted human keypoints for pose rectification to address misalignment between portrait and neck regions.
Constructed portrait-neck paired data using Nano Banana; applied SAM3 for neck segmentation and random masking to generate training samples.
Applied Qwen-Image-Edit-2509 for neck structure completion and keypoint-guided garment placement.

publications.name: Panoramic HDR Color Image from One-Second Spike Acquisition
publications.summary: Proposed a hybrid spike-camera and RGB-camera framework for HDR panoramic color image reconstruction from one-second spike acquisition. Developed a dual-branch reconstruction pipeline and applied Qwen-Image-Edit-2509 with LoRA for HDR panoramic colorization.

publications.name: Seam-Guided Unsupervised Image Stitching with Parallax-Aware Mask Generation
publications.publisher: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (CCF-B)
publications.summary: Proposed a seam-guided iterative alignment mechanism and a parallax-aware mask generation strategy for robust image stitching in large-parallax real-world scenes.

projects.name: Panoramic Image Stitching for Equipment Rooms Based on Spherical Projection
highlights: Developed a fast panoramic stitching algorithm for equipment-room scenarios with limited camera viewpoints.
Achieved panoramic reconstruction from 30 images within one second.
Estimated focal length using cylindrical projection models and dynamic FOV information.
Built spherical projection and equirectangular panorama generation pipelines.
Deployed the algorithm in China Tower business scenarios.

awards.title: Chinese Invention Patent: Method and System for High-Speed High-Dynamic-Range Color Panoramic Image Reconstruction
